title: Arcadia (starship)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Arcadia''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Darren T. Weeb]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
